title: Smart Sort AI Optimization – Purolator (Infosys Canada)
description: Spearheaded the modernization of Purolator's Smart Sort platform, migrating from legacy systems to Azure Cloud and integrating AI/ML for predictive routing and load balancing.
Gathered and refined logistics business requirements, designing Sort Plan and Route Plan Management modules, improving delivery network efficiency.
Enabled automated address triaging and dynamic sort plan overrides, reducing delivery errors and enhancing first-attempt delivery success rates.
Integrated real-time data flows with InfoHub, allowing seamless AI model updates and centralized operational monitoring.
impact: Enhanced parcel routing accuracy, reduced operational bottlenecks, and improved delivery turnaround time through AI-powered automation.

title: Digital Identity & CIAM Transformation – Canada Post (Innovapost, Infosys Canada)
description: Led identity data migration and governance for the CIAM platform, improving customer security and regulatory compliance.
Defined metadata standards, role-based access controls, and implemented fraud detection and AML screening processes.
Partnered with compliance teams to introduce new customer identity verification controls, improving fraud prevention during account onboarding.
Developed KPIs to monitor migration accuracy, authentication performance, and fraud detection rates, presenting insights during PMO steering meetings.
impact: Strengthened security for millions of Canada Post customers while aligning business processes with AML and privacy regulations.

title: Online Banking Modernization – Equitable Bank
description: Led AML screening, fraud detection, and customer risk workflow modernization in the digital banking platform, enhancing compliance and customer experience.
Partnered with stakeholders to gather business requirements, draft user stories, and define process flows for automation using WorkFusion.
Oversaw UAT planning and execution, ensuring successful rollout of secure digital banking features and risk monitoring tools.
Produced process flow diagrams, sprint planning artifacts, and status dashboards to align product delivery with compliance requirements.
impact: Delivered compliant and secure digital banking processes, reducing fraud risk and improving operational agility.

title: Pharmacy Order-to-Cash Optimization & ClaimsCenter Support – Walgreens (Genpact India)
description: Supported pharmacy O2C and clinical operations for Walgreens, improving claim processing, billing cycles, and patient safety systems.
Led Guidewire ClaimsCenter enhancements, optimizing claim triage, payment workflows, and integrations with billing & provider systems.
Produced KPIs for claim denial rates, refill turnaround, and billing cycle performance, supporting leadership decision-making.
Provided second-level support for clinical systems, leading user training and facilitating seamless technology adoption.
impact: Improved pharmacy claim processing timelines, optimized billing workflows, and enhanced healthcare compliance.
